title: Stegra (H2 Green Steel) is Granted SEK 1.2 B in State Aid
content: The Swedish Energy Agency is now granting Stegra state aid to build the world's first fully integrated steel plant where iron is manufactured using fossil-free hydrogen made from water and fossil-free electricity. The plant is expected to manufacture steel with around 93 per cent lower carbon dioxide impact than traditional ore-based blast furnace production.
author: Analysts Account
